75102.subject: Crypto Biz: The cost of stacking sats
75102.body:
Crypto Biz Newsletter

Автор: Cointelegraph


Автор: Cointelegraph

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/crypto-biz-cost-stacking-sats-cointelegraph-hjaxc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BRb1FHkNcSUOLXUaFK2%2B6tA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1gBKPs23IFjIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqus26vj~9g-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqus26vj-9g
  
This week, crypto analytics company CryptoQuant challenged the prevailing narrative around Michael Saylor’s Strategy, urging the company to pause Bitcoin purchases and rebuild its cash reserves. The warning came after its dividend coverage fell to just 14 months from roughly seven years. Strategy isn’t facing an immediate cash crunch, but CryptoQuant’s warning puts the spotlight on the financing structure behind its Bitcoin strategy. With cash reserves shrinking and dividend obligations increasing, Strategy’s ability to keep funding new purchases is drawing closer scrutiny. The rest of this week’s Crypto Biz shows how the industry is evolving. CBOE is eyeing perpetual Bitcoin and Ether futures, Chainlink is working with European and Korean banks on stablecoin-based FX settlement and Zcash miner Fortitude is heading to Nasdaq through an unlikely merger with a healthcare company. CryptoQuant urges Strategy to pause Bitcoin buying as dividend coverage drops to 14 months Earlier this week, CryptoQuant argued that Strategy’s aggressive Bitcoin accumulation has become increasingly difficult to sustain, urging the company to rebuild its cash reserves after dividend coverage fell to just 14 months from roughly seven years. CEO Ki Young Ju said the Strategy’s cash position has deteriorated as annual dividend obligations surged to $1.2 billion following large issuances of STRC preferred shares carrying an 11.5% yield. While Strategy’s cash reserve recovered to about $1.4 billion after recent MSTR share sales, it remains down 38% year-to-date after the company repurchased $1.5 billion of its 2029 senior notes. The warning comes as Strategy’s funding model faces additional pressure. STRC preferred shares recently fell as much as 17.5% below their $100 par value, limiting the company’s ability to raise fresh capital through additional preferred stock sales.  Strategy’s cash reserve and dividend coverage. Source: CryptoQuant Continue Reading… CBOE considers converting Bitcoin and Ether futures into perpetual contracts The Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) is weighing a plan to convert its continuous Bitcoin (BTC and Ether (ETH) futures into perpetual futures, according to a Wall Street Journal report. The potential move follows recent regulatory changes after the US Commodity Futures Trading Commission approved crypto perpetual futures for Kalshi and

75099.subject: 🏛 GPT-5.6 proves politics runs AI
75099.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** The US government is vetting who gets to use OpenAI's next model. Before GPT-5.6 ships to anyone, the White House wants to approve customers one at a time, a first for an American AI launch. Anthropic says China ran the largest theft of Claude on record. Apple is blaming AI for your pricier MacBook, and OpenAI published proof that its own staff barely chat with AI anymore, they delegate to it.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **OpenAI:** Why does the government get a say in who uses GPT-5.6?

* **Anthropic:** How did Alibaba allegedly copy Claude 28 million times?

* **Apple:** Why is your next MacBook more expensive?

* **AI Agents:** What happens when a company stops chatting with AI and starts delegating?


----------

----------
## [The White House restricts GPT 5.6, proving politics runs AI](https://www.axios.com/2026/06/25/trump-administration-openai-gpt-model-release)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/77139032-8022-4f70-96d4-daa7abb298c7/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_26.png?t=1782467915)
Caption: 

This is the most regulated AI launch ever. For the first time, the government gets a say in who uses an American AI model before it ships. 

The White House asked OpenAI to keep GPT-5.6 from the public and hand it out only to government-approved partners, one customer at a time.

Officials reportedly rate GPT-5.6 as good at finding software holes as Anthropic's Mythos, the exact capability that got Anthropic's Fable banned two weeks ago, so Washington's favorite lab gets chaperoned instead. 

OpenAI says it asked for this and everyone gets the model a couple of weeks later, which is true and beside the point. The government pulled a chair into any AI launch room, and that is not a chair anyone gives back.


----------







----------
## [5 days left to invest early in THE GTM accelerator](https://utm.genai.works/r/3eqzm9l)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/80b86db9-b0e8-4b06-ad04-ec22abc29d50/4c08851d-90ec-4eb2-938a-571f7462a888.png?t=1782467547)
Follow image link: (https://utm.genai.works/r/3eqzm9l)
Caption: 

GenAI Works owns the best distribution data out there. The type of data you get from helping Nvidia, Oracle and brands from all different sizes show their products to millions. 

So what do we do with this knowledge? 

Create an app that drives success and growth based on data nobody else can own. It’s called **ToneUp**. 

*

75098.subject: The Ment Tech Intelligence Brief
75098.body:
Ment Tech | Meant To Innovate

Автор: Ment Tech


Автор: Ment Tech

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ment-tech-intelligence-brief-menttechlabs-5etgc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BRoboJvjLQRy%2BWLhyMkun5g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3OPIIJpdQgjIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqur5lss~yw-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqur5lss-yw
  
There are five developments. Each one changes how we will build the phase of artificial intelligence and blockchain infrastructure. Here is what every founder, enterprise operator and investor building in this space needs to understand. ◆ DEVELOPMENT 01 SpaceX Just Bought Cursor For $60 Billion. The Largest Startup Acquisition In History Just Rewired The Coding Tools Market. What happened: SpaceX announced a $60 billion all-stock acquisition of Anysphere, the company behind Cursor, on June 16, 2026, using stock from its own Nasdaq debut four days earlier. The deal is the largest acquisition of a venture-backed startup in history. Cursor generates roughly $4 billion in annualized revenue with over 50,000 enterprise clients and reaches roughly two-thirds of the Fortune 500. SpaceX confirmed it has been jointly training a coding model with Cursor on its Colossus supercluster for months, and reports indicate the combined entity is preparing Origin, a new code repository platform positioned as a direct competitor to GitHub. Why it changes the build environment: xAI's Grok failed to gain meaningful developer adoption in the coding market, so SpaceX bought the company that already had it rather than keep trying to build it. That is a structural admission that distribution and developer trust, not raw model capability, decided this particular race. If the SpaceX-Cursor entity launches a GitHub competitor, the coding tools market is no longer just a model competition, it becomes an infrastructure and developer-platform competition with Microsoft on the other side. The Ment Tech perspective: We watch developer tooling consolidation closely because it changes which platforms our own build stack should assume will still exist in two years. A $60 billion acquisition folding a coding agent into a satellite and compute company is the clearest sign yet that the AI coding tools market is being decided by who owns infrastructure and capital, not who shipped the best model first. Clients standardizing internal workflows on any single coding tool right now should treat that choice as a build dependency, not a preference. ◆ DEVELOPMENT 02 Ripple's Stablecoin Just Got Approved In One Of The World's Strictest Crypto Markets. The Race For Regulated Dollar Rails Just Went Global.Japan Cleared RLUSD For Retail Use. The Approval Matters More Than The Token's Current Siz

75097.subject: SoFi acquired Composer and bet against the Agentic AI trading rush 🤖💸; Plaid’s AI now sees what no single bank c…
75097.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1094

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Friday! Today, we’re diving into FinTech giant SoFi, which just acquired Composer and bet against the Agentic AI trading rush (what Composer by SoFi is all about, why it’s interesting, how it stacks againts AI intiatives from Coinbase & Robinhood, and what’s next + bonus deep dive into Interactive Brokers’ new AI features [ https://substack.com/redirect/5503ff15-d558-40a6-99cd-b3722d837c81?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & how to build an AI Agent from scratch [ https://substack.com/redirect/a34f403b-1f68-4569-86c0-153ec00da2c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and Plaid whose new AI now see what no single bank can (what Plaid’s new sequential foundation model is all about, why it’s unique & how it compares to other AI initiaves from major FinTechs + bonus deep dive into Revolut’s PRAGMA AI model for money [ https://substack.com/redirect/6a274b57-9674-40c0-aaa2-aaad0c2af0fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & AI Playbook for Finance [ https://substack.com/redirect/81d53766-a94a-4952-a22b-b51d9bf1f3b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s just jump straight into the parading-defining stuff 🌶️
SoFi acquired Composer and bet against the Agentic AI trading rush 🤖💸
Following the money 💸 Every major brokerage is now racing to let AI make investment decisions for its customers. FinTech giant SoFi $SOFI  thinks most investors would rather build their own strategy.
On June 23, SoFi launched Composer by SoFi, an AI-powered platform that lets users describe investing strategies in plain English and converts them into rules-based, backtestable, auto-executing portfolios.
The timing is very deliberate here.
In the span of just four weeks, Robinhood [ https://substack.com/redirect/e607a64d-1cb3-4683-a362-e62445d00f94?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] shipped Agentic Trading, letting users connect external AI agents to isolated brokerage accounts for autonomous stock trades. Meanwhile, Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/05c616fc-ce93-4f2e-b89f-12092e88c223?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] followed with a 21-product blitz that included Coinbase Advisor, one of the first SEC-registered AI investment advisors, alongside Coinbase for Agents, a platform enabling third-party AI to trade crypto within user-set limits.
All three companies are now racing to define what AI-powered investing looks like. And they arrived at very different answers.
Let’s unpack this...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_dG9rZW49ZXlKMWMyVnlYMmxrSWpveE1Ea3dOVFV6TURnc0luQnZjM1JmYVdRaU9qSXdNelU0T0RFME1Dd2lhV0YwSWpveE56Z3lORFkyTWprMUxDSmxlSEFpT2pFNE1UUXdNREl5T1RV
